projectDescription: AI-powered chat and coding assistant extension for Visual Studio Code, featuring autonomous agent mode, inline suggestions, and deep IDE integration.
keyFeatures: Autonomous agent mode that plans, edits files, runs commands, and self-corrects
Inline AI suggestions with ghost text and next edit suggestions (NES)
Inline chat for targeted, context-aware edits inside the editor
Multi-session agent management with parallel session support
MCP (Model Context Protocol) server integration for external tools and data
Custom instructions and project-level AI context configuration
Chat participants and custom agents via VS Code extension API
Support for all major programming languages
TSX-based prompt composition framework with token budget management
Cloud agent delegation for creating branches and opening pull requests
publicApiSurface: vscode.LanguageModelTool — interface for implementing custom tools
ICopilotTool — extended tool interface with additional Copilot capabilities
ToolRegistry.registerTool() — register a tool with the agent
ToolRegistry.registerModelSpecificTool() — register a model-specific tool override
PromptElement / PromptRenderer — TSX-based prompt composition system
contributes.languageModelTools — package.json contribution point for tools
contributes.languageModelToolSets — package.json contribution point for tool sets
vscode.lm.invokeTool() — VS Code API to invoke a registered language model tool
IIntentInvocation.buildPrompt() — interface for building intent prompts
chatParticipants (chat participants API) — register @workspace, @vscode, and custom agents
